name: kimi-datasource
description: Finance, macro, enterprise, and academic data tools for Kimi Code.

query_stock.description: Query realtime stock price, realtime technical indicators, open summaries, or close summaries for up to 3 tickers.

ticker.description: Ticker code list separated by commas, for example 600519.SH or 0700.HK.

time.description: Optional time parameter for supported realtime endpoints.

file_path.description: Optional CSV output path. When omitted, the tool chooses a temporary path.

get_data_source_desc.description: Get the current API documentation for one Kimi data source before calling a specific API.

call_data_source_tool.description: Call one API from a Kimi data source after reading get_data_source_desc.

data_source_name.description: Data source name returned or documented by get_data_source_desc.

api_name.description: API name from the data source description.

params.description: API parameters that match the data source description.

interface.shortDescription: Finance, macro, enterprise, and academic data tools
